session.assistant:
pytest failed: Circular import error
There is a circular import preventing the tests from even being collected:
- `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev/src/erk_dev/commands/reserve_pypi_name/command.py` imports from `erk_dev.cli.output` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev/src/erk_dev/cli/__init__.py` tries to import `reserve_pypi_name_command` from `erk_dev.commands.reserve_pypi_name.command` - This creates a circular dependency that breaks the import chain
Error location: ``` packages/erk-dev/src/erk_dev/cli/__init__.py:32: in <module> from erk_dev.commands.reserve_pypi_name.command import ( E ImportError: cannot import name 'reserve_pypi_name_command' from partially initialized module ```
The module system cannot complete initialization of `command.py` because `cli/__init__.py` is trying to import from it before it finishes loading.
